name.description: Specifies the name of the capacity reservation group, which must be unique within the resource group and comply with Azure naming conventions.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to organize and categorize resources, typically for management and billing purposes.

timeouts.description: Defines custom timeouts for create, read, update, and delete operations, allowing control over the maximum duration of each operation.

zones.description: Specifies the Azure availability zones where the capacity reservation group will be created; must match the zones supported by the selected region.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
